name: Sunflower Seed Romesco
instructions: Roast tomato and piquillo pepper (drizzle with some olive oil) until golden, 10-15 minutes
In a food processor (not Vitamix), blend chilled toasted sunflower seeds, garlic confit, pepper, tomato, olive oil, sea salt and sherry vinegar until chunky
Taste for seasoning — may need to adjust with more vinegar
notes: If you don't have sunflower seeds, use pumpkin seeds
If using Picual olive oil, it may be too bitter — adjust with 1 teaspoon sugar and 1 tablespoon sherry vinegar
